en: It's time to go It's time we went What's the difference in meaning
ko: It's time to go와 It's time we went의 의미 차이가 뭘까?

en: Listen to this and see if you can work it out It's time to go The meeting's about to start
ko: 이걸 듣고 알아낼 수 있는지 봐. It's time to go. 회의가 곧 시작돼.

en: It's time we went The meeting started 20 minutes ago
ko: It's time we went. 회의가 20분 전에 시작됐어.

en: We use it's time to go when the time has arrived for us to do something The
ko: It's time to go는 뭔가를 할 시간이 도래했을 때 써.

en: meeting's about to start It's time to go But we use it's time with the past
ko: 회의가 곧 시작돼. It's time to go. 하지만 it's time에 과거

en: tense it's time we went to make it more urgent
ko: 시제를 쓰면, it's time we went, 더 긴급해져.

en: We're late doing something that should have already happened So even though we're using the past
ko: 이미 일어났어야 할 일에 늦은 거야. 과거 시제를 쓰지만

en: we're not really talking about the past
ko: 실제로 과거에 대해 말하는 게 아니야.

en: Careful we don't say it's time you go You can say it's time to go it's time for you to
ko: 주의해, it's time you go라고 하지 않아. It's time to go, it's time for you to

en: go or it's time you went Now try to make this more urgent It's time you went to
ko: go, 또는 it's time you went라고 해. 이제 이걸 더 긴급하게 만들어봐. 댓글 섹션에 가서

en: our comments section to check out the answer and share your own
ko: 정답을 확인하고 너의 답도 공유할 시간이야.
